context.projectOverview: Fleet Orchestrator Sprint 3 (critical isolation + concurrency): FleetCoordinator.execute() fans children through the existing mapBounded() at the configured cap via a never-reject per-child thunk (scaffold -> run, all errors captured as data); OutcomeAggregator.aggregate() resolves each child's status disk-primary from its newest .bober/runs/<runId>/state.json with an exit-code fallback.

completedSprints.title: Manifest schema, loader, child config builder
Scaffolder + runner
completedSprints.summary: src/fleet/scaffolder.ts ChildScaffolder.scaffold(rootDir, child): Promise<ScaffoldResult{folder,absPath,configWritten,gitInitialized,error?}> (never throws, non-empty folders skipped). src/fleet/runner.ts ChildRunner (constructor accepts {cliEntry?,nodeBin?} test seam).run(spec{cwd,task,timeoutMs?}): Promise<ChildSpawnResult{cwd,exitCode,stdout,stderr,timedOut?,spawnError?}> (never throws). resolveCliEntry(), probeCliVersion().
